ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €, £, ₹) */,
  "currency_type" TEXT /* Type of currency (fiat or cryptocurrency) */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the currency */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the currency (active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the currency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the exchange rate */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the exchange rate was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_quote_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Historical price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the price */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the price was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the price was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., individual investor, institutional investor, financial institution) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency in the portfolio */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio involved in the transaction */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, transfer) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, update portfolio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
